---
title: "R Notebook"
output: html_notebook
---

This is an [R Markdown](http://rmarkdown.rstudio.com) Notebook. When you execute code within the notebook, the results appear beneath the code. 


```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = TRUE)
```

```{r libraries, include=FALSE}
library(fitzRoy)
library(dplyr)
library(purrr)
library(lubridate)
library(slider)
library(tidyr)
library(lightgbm)
source("Bookies_Scraper.R")
source("Odds_Data_Cleaner.R")
source("Pointsbet_Scraper.R")
```

## R Markdown

```{r EWMA}
library(purrr)

calc_ewma <- function(x, alpha = 0.7) {
  if (length(x) == 0) return(numeric(0))
  accumulate(x, ~ alpha * .y + (1 - alpha) * .x)
}

```


```{r AFL Data}
##Extract Data spanning the past decade
current_year <- as.numeric(format(Sys.Date(), "%Y"))
seasons <- 2016:current_year
data_player <- map_dfr(seasons, ~ fetch_player_stats(season = .x))

##Get AFL fixture to help determine opponent team 
fixtures <- fetch_fixture(season = current_year) %>%
  filter(status == "UNCONFIRMED_TEAMS") %>%
  dplyr::select(providerId, home.team.name, away.team.name)


##Extract AFL Lineup data of games that haven't happened
afl_lineups <- fetch_lineup_afl(season = current_year) %>%
  filter(status == "UNCONFIRMED_TEAMS") %>%
  left_join(fixtures, by="providerId") %>%
  mutate(year = year(utcStartTime),
         opponent = case_when(
           teamType == 'home' & teamName == home.team.name ~ away.team.name,
           teamType == 'away' & teamName == away.team.name ~ home.team.name
         ),
         venue = venue.name) %>%
  dplyr::select(providerId,
                status,
                player.playerId,
                player.playerName.givenName, 
                player.playerName.surname,
                position,
                year,
                round.roundNumber,
                teamName,
                opponent,
                venue
                )

## Extract total cbas in a game
#cba attended/total clearance per game to get percentage
ttl_cba_per_match <- data_player %>%
group_by(providerId) %>%
  summarise(
  total_cbs = sum( clearances.centreClearances, na.rm = TRUE),
  .groups = "drop")


## Create dataframe that will be binded onto player stats disposals
# Align afl_lineups columns to match player_stats_disposals schema
future_games <- afl_lineups %>%
  mutate(
    player.givenName                        = player.playerName.givenName,
    player.surname                          = player.playerName.surname,
    player.player.position                  = position,
    team.name                               = teamName,
    disposals                               = NA_real_,
    inside50s  = NA_real_,
    clearances.totalClearances             = NA_real_,
    timeOnGroundPercentage                  = NA_real_,
    CBA_prop    = NA_real_,
    extendedStats.pressureActs              = NA_real_,
    extendedStats.defHalfPressureActs       = NA_real_,
    contestedPossessions = NA_real_,
    uncontestedPossessions = NA_real_,
    extendedStats.groundBallGets = NA_real_,
    metresGained = NA_real_
  ) %>%
  dplyr::select(
    providerId,
    status,
    player.playerId,
    player.givenName,
    player.surname,
    player.player.position,
    year,
    round.roundNumber,
    team.name,
    opponent,
    venue,
    disposals,
    clearances.totalClearances,
    inside50s,
    timeOnGroundPercentage,
    CBA_prop,
    #Following below is used for team stats
    contestedPossessions,
    uncontestedPossessions,
    extendedStats.groundBallGets,
    metresGained
  )



##Get the disposal stats
player_stats_disposals_concluded <- data_player  %>%
  left_join(ttl_cba_per_match, by = c("providerId")) %>%
  filter(status == "CONCLUDED" | status == "CONFIRMED_TEAMS" ) %>%
  mutate(year = year(utcStartTime),
         CBA_prop = (extendedStats.centreBounceAttendances/total_cbs) * 100,
         opponent = case_when(
           teamStatus == 'home' & team.name == home.team.name ~ away.team.name,
           teamStatus == 'away' & team.name == away.team.name ~ home.team.name
         ),
    venue = venue.name) %>%
  dplyr::select(
    providerId,
    status,
    player.playerId,
    player.givenName,
    player.surname,
    player.player.position,
    year,
    round.roundNumber,
    team.name,
    opponent,
    venue,
    disposals,
    inside50s,
    clearances.totalClearances,
    timeOnGroundPercentage,
    CBA_prop,
    #Following below is used for team stats
    contestedPossessions,
    uncontestedPossessions,
    extendedStats.groundBallGets,
    metresGained
    
  )

# Bind into the main dataframe
player_stats_disposals <- bind_rows(player_stats_disposals_concluded, future_games)

```

```{r feature_engineering}
##conduct feature engineering on the data that will be trained on

##Use lag function to get prior game disposal
player_stats_disposals <- player_stats_disposals %>%
  arrange(year, round.roundNumber) %>%
  group_by(player.playerId) %>%
  mutate(
    disp_lag = lag(disposals),
    inside50s_lag = lag(inside50s),
    totalClearances_lag = lag(clearances.totalClearances),
    cba_lag = lag(CBA_prop),
    tog_lag = lag(timeOnGroundPercentage),
    cp_lag = lag(contestedPossessions),
    ucp_lag = lag(uncontestedPossessions),
    gbg_lag = lag(extendedStats.groundBallGets),
    mg_lag = lag(metresGained)
    
  )

##Calculate averages and use lag to shift prior
player_stats_disposals <- player_stats_disposals %>%
  arrange(year, round.roundNumber) %>%
  group_by(player.playerId) %>%
  mutate(
    ewma_disp_lag    = replace(disp_lag, !is.na(disp_lag), calc_ewma(disp_lag[!is.na(disp_lag)])),
    ewma_inside50s_lag    = replace(inside50s_lag, !is.na(inside50s_lag), calc_ewma(inside50s_lag[!is.na(inside50s_lag)])),
    ewma_totalClearances_lag  = replace(totalClearances_lag, !is.na(totalClearances_lag), calc_ewma(totalClearances_lag[!is.na(totalClearances_lag)])),
    ewma_TOG_lag     = replace(tog_lag, !is.na(tog_lag), calc_ewma(tog_lag[!is.na(tog_lag)])),
    ewma_cba_lag     = replace(cba_lag, !is.na(cba_lag), calc_ewma(cba_lag[!is.na(cba_lag)])),
    avg_disp_last5   = lag(slide_dbl(disp_lag, ~ mean(.x, na.rm = TRUE), .before = 4, .complete = FALSE)),
    var_disp_last5   = lag(slide_dbl(disp_lag, ~ var(.x, na.rm = TRUE), .before = 4, .complete = FALSE)),
    avg_inside50s_last5   = lag(slide_dbl(inside50s_lag, ~ mean(.x, na.rm = TRUE), .before = 4, .complete = FALSE)),
    avg_totalClearances_last5   = lag(slide_dbl(totalClearances_lag, ~ mean(.x, na.rm = TRUE), .before = 4, .complete = FALSE)),
    avg_TOG_last5   = lag(slide_dbl(tog_lag, ~ mean(.x, na.rm = TRUE), .before = 4, .complete = FALSE)),
    avg_cba_last5   = lag(slide_dbl(cba_lag, ~ mean(.x, na.rm = TRUE), .before = 4, .complete = FALSE)),
    avg_disp_last3   = lag(slide_dbl(disp_lag, ~ mean(.x, na.rm = TRUE), .before = 2, .complete = FALSE)),
    var_disp_last3   = lag(slide_dbl(disp_lag, ~ var(.x, na.rm = TRUE), .before = 2, .complete = FALSE))
  ) %>%
  ungroup()


opponent_defensive_profile <- player_stats_disposals %>%      # exclude future game rows
  group_by(year, round.roundNumber, opponent) %>%
  summarise(
    disp_conceded          = sum(disp_lag,                       na.rm = TRUE),
    cont_poss_conceded     = sum(cp_lag,            na.rm = TRUE),
    uncont_poss_conceded   = sum(ucp_lag,          na.rm = TRUE),
    gbg_conceded           = sum(gbg_lag,    na.rm = TRUE),
    metres_gained_conceded = sum(mg_lag,      na.rm = TRUE),
    .groups = "drop"
  )

library(slider)

opponent_defensive_profile <- opponent_defensive_profile %>%
  arrange(opponent, year, round.roundNumber) %>%
  group_by(opponent, year) %>%
  mutate(
    # Rolling 5 game average for each stat
    avg_disp_conceded          = lag(slide_dbl(disp_conceded,          ~ mean(.x, na.rm = TRUE), .before = 4, .complete = FALSE)),
    avg_cont_poss_conceded     = lag(slide_dbl(cont_poss_conceded,     ~ mean(.x, na.rm = TRUE), .before = 4, .complete = FALSE)),
    avg_uncont_poss_conceded   = lag(slide_dbl(uncont_poss_conceded,   ~ mean(.x, na.rm = TRUE), .before = 4, .complete = FALSE)),
    avg_gbg_conceded           = lag(slide_dbl(gbg_conceded,           ~ mean(.x, na.rm = TRUE), .before = 4, .complete = FALSE)),
    avg_metres_gained_conceded = lag(slide_dbl(metres_gained_conceded, ~ mean(.x, na.rm = TRUE), .before = 4, .complete = FALSE))
  ) %>%
  ungroup()


league_avgs <- opponent_defensive_profile %>%
  filter(!is.na(avg_disp_conceded)) %>%
  summarise(
    league_disp          = mean(disp_conceded,          na.rm = TRUE),
    league_cont_poss     = mean(cont_poss_conceded,     na.rm = TRUE),
    league_uncont_poss   = mean(uncont_poss_conceded,   na.rm = TRUE),
    league_gbg           = mean(gbg_conceded,           na.rm = TRUE),
    league_metres_gained = mean(metres_gained_conceded, na.rm = TRUE)
  )

opponent_defensive_profile <- opponent_defensive_profile %>%
  mutate(
    opp_disp_factor          = avg_disp_conceded          / league_avgs$league_disp,
    opp_cont_poss_factor     = avg_cont_poss_conceded     / league_avgs$league_cont_poss,
    opp_uncont_poss_factor   = avg_uncont_poss_conceded   / league_avgs$league_uncont_poss,
    opp_gbg_factor           = avg_gbg_conceded           / league_avgs$league_gbg,
    opp_metres_gained_factor = avg_metres_gained_conceded / league_avgs$league_metres_gained
  ) %>%
  dplyr::select(
    year, round.roundNumber, opponent,
    opp_disp_factor,
    opp_cont_poss_factor,
    opp_uncont_poss_factor,
    opp_gbg_factor,
    opp_metres_gained_factor
  )

player_stats_disposals <- player_stats_disposals %>%
  left_join(
    opponent_defensive_profile,
    by = c("opponent", "year", "round.roundNumber")
  )

```

```{r}
##Final Data Output


new_data <- player_stats_disposals %>%
  filter(status != "CONCLUDED") %>% 
  dplyr::select(player.playerId,player.givenName, player.surname, 
         player.player.position, year, round.roundNumber, opponent, venue, disposals,
         disp_lag, cba_lag, tog_lag, totalClearances_lag, inside50s_lag,
         ewma_TOG_lag, ewma_disp_lag, ewma_cba_lag, ewma_inside50s_lag, ewma_totalClearances_lag, 
         avg_disp_last5, avg_cba_last5, avg_TOG_last5, avg_inside50s_last5, avg_totalClearances_last5,
        var_disp_last5, avg_disp_last3,
        var_disp_last3, opp_disp_factor, opp_cont_poss_factor, opp_uncont_poss_factor,
        opp_gbg_factor, opp_metres_gained_factor)

```


```{r}
##XGBoost Model
library(xgboost)
library(dplyr)
library(tidyr)
model_xgb <- xgb.load("model_xgb_final.ubj")

sys <- readRDS("xgb_system.rds")

features_xgb <- sys$features_xgb
sigma_xgb_norm <- sys$sigma_xgb_norm
opp_levels <- sys$opp_levels_xgb
pos_levels <- sys$pos_levels_xgb
venue_levels <- sys$venue_levels_xgb

new_data <- new_data %>%
  mutate(
    position_encoded = as.numeric(factor(player.player.position, levels = pos_levels)),
    venue_encoded    = as.numeric(factor(venue,     levels = venue_levels)),
    opp_encoded      = as.numeric(factor(opponent,  levels = opp_levels))
  )

new_data <- new_data %>%
  mutate(
    confidence_flag = case_when(
      is.na(ewma_disp_lag)  ~ "no_history",
      is.na(avg_disp_last3) ~ "insufficient_history",
      is.na(avg_disp_last5) ~ "insufficient_history",
      TRUE                  ~ "ok"
    )
  )

# ── 2. Create DMatrix (no label needed for prediction) ────────────────────────
new_matrix <- xgb.DMatrix(
  data = as.matrix(new_data[, features_xgb])
)

# ── 3. Predict lambda (expected disposal count) ───────────────────────────────
lambda_new <- predict(model_xgb, new_matrix)



# ── Define lines ──────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
lines <- 10:30

# ── Generate probabilities for each line ─────────────────────────────────────
prob_table <- lapply(lines, function(l) {
  new_data %>%
    mutate(
      line           = l,
      prob_over_norm = pnorm(l - 0.5, mean = lambda_new, sd = sigma_xgb_norm, lower.tail = FALSE),
      decimal_odds   = 1 / prob_over_norm,
    ) %>%
    dplyr::select(player.givenName, player.surname, opponent, line,
                  prob_over_norm, decimal_odds, confidence_flag)
}) %>%
  bind_rows()

# ── Point prediction — one row per player ─────────────────────────────────────
point_predictions <- new_data %>%
  mutate(predicted_disposals = round(lambda_new, 1)) %>%
  dplyr::select(player.givenName, player.surname, opponent, predicted_disposals)

# ── Get Sportsbet odds ────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
event_ids   <- sportsbet_eventid_extractor()
all_markets <- bind_rows(map(event_ids$event_id, sportsbet_Scraper))

# ── Get PointsBet odds ────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
pb_raw <- pointsbet_scraper()

# ── Pivot model wide ──────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
prob_table_wide <- prob_table %>%
  dplyr::select(player.givenName, player.surname, opponent,
                line, decimal_odds, confidence_flag) %>%
  pivot_wider(
    names_from   = line,
    values_from  = decimal_odds,
    names_prefix = "line_"
  ) %>%
  # ── Join point prediction onto wide table ─────────────────────────────────
  left_join(point_predictions, by = c("player.givenName", "player.surname", "opponent"))

# ── Clean Sportsbet odds ──────────────────────────────────────────────────────
clean_odds <- extract_afl_props(all_markets) %>%
  mutate(fair_odds = 1 / ((1 / odds) / 1.08))

clean_odds_wide <- clean_odds %>%
  mutate(
    line      = as.numeric(str_extract(market, "\\d+")),
    full_name = selection_name
  ) %>%
  filter(
    stat == "disposals",
    str_detect(market, "^\\d+\\+\\s*[Dd]isposals$")
  ) %>%
  mutate(
    player.givenName = str_extract(full_name, "^\\S+"),
    player.surname   = str_remove(full_name,  "^\\S+\\s+")
  ) %>%
  dplyr::select(player.givenName, player.surname, line, odds) %>%
  pivot_wider(
    names_from  = line,
    values_from = c(odds),
    names_glue  = "{.value}_{line}"
  ) %>%
  rename_with(~ str_replace(., "^odds_", "sportsbet_odds_"), starts_with("odds_"))

# ── Clean PointsBet odds ──────────────────────────────────────────────────────
clean_odds_pb_wide <- pb_raw %>%
  filter(str_detect(market, "^To Get Disposals")) %>%
  mutate(
    line      = as.numeric(str_extract(selection, "\\d+(?=\\+)")),
    full_name = selection %>%
      str_squish() %>%
      str_remove_all(regex("\\b(over\\s*)?\\d+\\+?", ignore_case = TRUE)) %>%
      str_remove_all("[-–]") %>%
      str_squish(),
    name_parts       = str_split(full_name, "\\s+"),
    player.givenName = sapply(name_parts, `[`, 1),
    player.surname   = sapply(name_parts, function(x) {
      if (length(x) > 1) paste(x[-1], collapse = " ") else NA_character_
    })
  ) %>%
  filter(type == "Other", !is.na(line), !is.na(odds)) %>%
  dplyr::select(player.givenName, player.surname, line, odds) %>%
  pivot_wider(
    names_from  = line,
    values_from = odds,
    names_glue  = "pb_odds_{line}"
  )

# ── Join all sources ──────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
comparison <- prob_table_wide %>%
  left_join(clean_odds_wide,    by = c("player.givenName", "player.surname")) %>%
  left_join(clean_odds_pb_wide, by = c("player.givenName", "player.surname")) %>%
  filter(confidence_flag == "ok")

# ── Derive common lines per bookmaker ─────────────────────────────────────────
model_lines <- as.numeric(str_extract(
  colnames(comparison)[str_detect(colnames(comparison), "^line_\\d+")], "\\d+"))

sportsbet_lines <- as.numeric(str_extract(
  colnames(comparison)[str_detect(colnames(comparison), "^sportsbet_odds_\\d+")], "\\d+"))

pb_lines <- as.numeric(str_extract(
  colnames(comparison)[str_detect(colnames(comparison), "^pb_odds_\\d+")], "\\d+"))

common_lines_sb <- intersect(model_lines, sportsbet_lines)
common_lines_pb <- intersect(model_lines, pb_lines)

# ── Calculate EV — Sportsbet ──────────────────────────────────────────────────
for (l in common_lines_sb) {
  model_col     <- paste0("line_", l)
  sportsbet_col <- paste0("sportsbet_odds_", l)
  ev_col        <- paste0("ev_sb_", l)

  comparison <- comparison %>%
    mutate(
      !!ev_col := (1 / .data[[model_col]]) * (.data[[sportsbet_col]] - 1) -
                 (1 - (1 / .data[[model_col]])) * 1
    )
}

# ── Calculate EV — PointsBet ──────────────────────────────────────────────────
for (l in common_lines_pb) {
  model_col <- paste0("line_", l)
  pb_col    <- paste0("pb_odds_", l)
  ev_col    <- paste0("ev_pb_", l)

  comparison <- comparison %>%
    mutate(
      !!ev_col := (1 / .data[[model_col]]) * (.data[[pb_col]] - 1) -
                 (1 - (1 / .data[[model_col]])) * 1
    )
}

# ── Pivot model odds long ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────
model_long <- comparison %>%
  dplyr::select(player.givenName, player.surname, opponent,
                predicted_disposals, starts_with("line_")) %>%
  pivot_longer(
    cols         = starts_with("line_"),
    names_to     = "line",
    values_to    = "model_odds",
    names_prefix = "line_"
  ) %>%
  mutate(line = as.numeric(line))

# ── Pivot Sportsbet odds long ─────────────────────────────────────────────────
sportsbet_long <- comparison %>%
  dplyr::select(player.givenName, player.surname, starts_with("sportsbet_odds_")) %>%
  pivot_longer(
    cols         = starts_with("sportsbet_odds_"),
    names_to     = "line",
    values_to    = "sportsbet_odds",
    names_prefix = "sportsbet_odds_"
  ) %>%
  mutate(line = as.numeric(line))

# ── Pivot PointsBet odds long ─────────────────────────────────────────────────
pb_long <- comparison %>%
  dplyr::select(player.givenName, player.surname, starts_with("pb_odds_")) %>%
  pivot_longer(
    cols         = starts_with("pb_odds_"),
    names_to     = "line",
    values_to    = "pb_odds",
    names_prefix = "pb_odds_"
  ) %>%
  mutate(line = as.numeric(line))

# ── Pivot EV long — Sportsbet ─────────────────────────────────────────────────
ev_sb_long <- comparison %>%
  dplyr::select(player.givenName, player.surname, starts_with("ev_sb_")) %>%
  pivot_longer(
    cols         = starts_with("ev_sb_"),
    names_to     = "line",
    values_to    = "ev_sportsbet",
    names_prefix = "ev_sb_"
  ) %>%
  mutate(line = as.numeric(line))

# ── Pivot EV long — PointsBet ─────────────────────────────────────────────────
ev_pb_long <- comparison %>%
  dplyr::select(player.givenName, player.surname, starts_with("ev_pb_")) %>%
  pivot_longer(
    cols         = starts_with("ev_pb_"),
    names_to     = "line",
    values_to    = "ev_pb",
    names_prefix = "ev_pb_"
  ) %>%
  mutate(line = as.numeric(line))

# ── Join all and filter positive EV ──────────────────────────────────────────
comparison_long <- model_long %>%
  left_join(sportsbet_long, by = c("player.givenName", "player.surname", "line")) %>%
  left_join(pb_long,        by = c("player.givenName", "player.surname", "line")) %>%
  left_join(ev_sb_long,     by = c("player.givenName", "player.surname", "line")) %>%
  left_join(ev_pb_long,     by = c("player.givenName", "player.surname", "line")) %>%
  filter(!is.na(ev_sportsbet) | !is.na(ev_pb)) %>%
  filter(ev_sportsbet > 0 | ev_pb > 0) %>%
  dplyr::select(player.givenName, player.surname, opponent,
                predicted_disposals, line,
                model_odds, sportsbet_odds, ev_sportsbet,
                pb_odds, ev_pb) %>%
  arrange(desc(pmax(ev_sportsbet, ev_pb, na.rm = TRUE)))

print(comparison_long, n = Inf)

#print(comparison_long, n = Inf)
```



```{r}
write.csv(prob_table_wide, "afl_disp_prob.csv", row.names = FALSE)
write.csv(comparison_long, "EV_Disp.csv", row.names = FALSE)


```
